description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a soft, olive-green upholstered seat and backrest, featuring vertical stitched detailing for added texture and visual interest. The seat and back are generously padded, providing ergonomic support and comfort. The chair is supported by a sturdy black metal base with five legs, each ending in a caster wheel for smooth mobility. The central support column is metallic and likely adjustable, though no adjustment levers are visible. The backrest is gently curved and extends to mid-back height, offering moderate lumbar support. The chair lacks armrests, giving it a sleek, minimalist profile suitable for office or home use.
description: A modern olive-green swivel chair with a padded, stitched seat and back, black metal base, and five caster wheels. It has a curved backrest and no armrests, offering a sleek, comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full padded seat and vertically stitched backrest, highlighting the chair's ergonomic contour and lack of armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the chair's thick cushioning, the gentle backward curve of the backrest, and the black metal base with visible casters.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the chair and the full width of the backrest, as well as the five-legged base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's thickness, the backrest's curve, and the base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal cylindrical column, likely steel, connecting the seat to the five-legged base; appears sturdy and may be height-adjustable though no lever is visible.
attribute_seat_back_design: The seat back is mid-height, gently curved, and upholstered in olive-green fabric with vertical stitched lines for texture; it is padded for comfort and has no cutouts.
